data.name: Vepley

weaponImprint.name: Heart Seeker
weaponImprint.effect:
Deals additional fixed damage equal to 10%/15%/15%/20%/20%/20% of attack each time an active skill deals damage. Damage to targets with movement debuffs is increased by 10%/10%/15%/15%/20%/20%. When taking targeted damage, if the attacker has movement debuffs, applies [effect:ec300590-24ec-4e6c-976d-708c9dc08e55]/[effect:ec300590-24ec-4e6c-976d-708c9dc08e55]/[effect:ec300590-24ec-4e6c-976d-708c9dc08e55]/[effect:fbd44ec2-ad9a-47c6-8b5d-374a1dcf0b96]/[effect:fbd44ec2-ad9a-47c6-8b5d-374a1dcf0b96]/[effect:fbd44ec2-ad9a-47c6-8b5d-374a1dcf0b96] to them for 1/1/1/1/1/2 turns before damage is dealt. This can only be triggered once per turn. At R6 there is no limit to how many times this can be triggered.

Dandegate note: Heart Seeker has a unique effect where it increases damage done by skills that use Confectance Index by 30%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increases damage dealt to Paradeus by 2.5%. If the target has no buffs, increases it by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: An idol who shines on the unique stage, the "battlefield"! She prepares meiculously every day for her next performance - this way, she will not easily trip or bump into others again.

skills.name: Live Interaction
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 5 tiles and deal physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Idol Talent
skills.description: At the start of action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. For each instance of damage dealt, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. Damage dealt to targets with movement debuffs is increased by 20%.
skills.descriptionLevel2: At the start of action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. For each instance of damage dealt, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. Damage dealt to targets with movement debuffs is increased by 20%. If this unit moved 3 or more tiles, applies [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] to the target for 2 turns before attacking.
skills.descriptionLevel3: At the start of action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. For each instance of damage dealt, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. Damage dealt to targets with movement debuffs is increased by 20%. If this unit moved 3 or more tiles, applies [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] to the target for 2 turns before attacking. If the target has movement debuffs, applies [effect:42d85a9b-2025-4f14-b4c2-df25f9c11bd3] to them for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If this unit moved 3 or more tiles, applies [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] to the target before attacking.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: If the target has movement debuffs, applies [effect:42d85a9b-2025-4f14-b4c2-df25f9c11bd3] to them for 1 turn.

skills.name: All Out Performance
skills.description:
Select 1 direction and deal AoE physical damage equal to 75% of attack to the first enemy target in each line within a 3x5 area in the chosen direction and knock those targets back by 4 tiles.

Simultaneously, destroy destructible Cover within a 3x3 area around the user.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Select 1 direction and deal AoE physical damage equal to 75% of attack to the first enemy target in each line within a 3x5 area in the chosen direction and knock those targets back by 4 tiles.

Simultaneously, destroy destructible Cover within a 3x3 area around the user. If 2 or more targets are hit, gain 3 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If 2 or more targets are hit, gain 3 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

skills.name: Exclusive Stage
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 5 tiles and deal physical damage equal to 150% of attack to it. If the target is not protected by Cover, cleanse 2 of its buffs before attacking.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 enemy target within 5 tiles and deal physical damage equal to 150% of attack to it. If the target has movement debuffs, increase critical rate by 100%. If the target is not protected by Cover, cleanse 2 of its buffs before attacking.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If the target has movement debuffs, increase critical rate by 100%.

skills.name: Infectious Enthusiasm
skills.description: Selects 1 tile within 5 tiles to attack, dealing AoE physical damage equal to 100% of attack and applying [effect:b322b1fd-06e1-424b-8b1b-65bdaf96b4f4] and [effect:cc1ca7a9-6314-4501-86b9-4f88892c00a6] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 tile within 5 tiles to attack, applying [effect:b322b1fd-06e1-424b-8b1b-65bdaf96b4f4] to all enemy targets within 2 tiles, dealing AoE physical damage equal to 100% of attack and applying [effect:cc1ca7a9-6314-4501-86b9-4f88892c00a6] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 tile within 5 tiles to attack, applying [effect:b322b1fd-06e1-424b-8b1b-65bdaf96b4f4] to all enemy targets within 2 tiles, dealing AoE physical damage equal to 100% of attack and applying [effect:cc1ca7a9-6314-4501-86b9-4f88892c00a6] for 2 turns. If only 1 target is hit, applies [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to the target for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: [effect:b322b1fd-06e1-424b-8b1b-65bdaf96b4f4] is now applied before the attack instead of after.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: If only 1 target is hit, applies [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] for 1 turn.

keys.effect: If the user's Mobility is greater than or equal to the target's, increase damage dealt by 7%.

Attacks ignore 15% of the target's defense. If the target has movement debuffs, ignore an additional 15% of their defense. When using the active skill All-Out Performance, applies [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] and [effect:cc1ca7a9-6314-4501-86b9-4f88892c00a6] to the target for 2 turns.
Increases stability damage dealt against enemy targets with movement debuffs by 2 points.
The range of All Out Performance changes to 5x3 tiles, knockback distance changes to 1 tile.
If there are no allied units within 6 tiles of the user, gain 1 stack of [effect:af640815-bbef-471b-8888-cee6c3d8b4a4] at the end of the action.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 3 - Fortune of an Idol

keys.effect: When using Exclusive Stage, ignores 10% of Cover damage reduction against targets with movement debuffs.
If there is Cover nearby, reduces AoE damage taken by 20%.
When applying a movement debuff to a large target, additionally deals 1 instance of fixed damage equal to 15% of attack.

vertebrae.effect: If 2 or more targets are hit, gain 3 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

doll.name: Vepley
doll.effects: An idol who shines on the unique stage, the "battlefield"! She prepares meiculously every day for her next performance - this way, she will not easily trip or bump into others again.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with movement debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets with 50% or lower HP is increased by 10%.
After inflicting a critical hit, deal 6 points of fixed stability damage to the enemy target. This effect can trigger up to 1 time per turn.

dollEffects.effectDetails: When attacked by Vepley, increase damage taken by 30%. This debuff cannot be cleansed.
